title: Hien Nhung TOEIC - Test 2
description: Đề thi thử TOEIC Full 200 câu (Chuẩn cấu trúc)

listeningParts.title: Part 1: Photographs
listeningParts.instruction: For each question, select the statement that best describes the picture.

questions.script: (A) A man is closing a metal gate. (B) A man is walking down a stone path. (C) Some potted plants line a walkway. (D) Some flags are hanging from balconies.
(A) Some shopping bags have been placed... (D) A man is leaning against a railing.
(A) Some wooden planks... (B) A vehicle is parked next to a building.
(A) A man is holding up his phone.
(C) She's working at a counter.
(A) He's setting up a buffet.

listeningParts.title: Part 2: Question-Response
listeningParts.instruction: Mark the best response to the question or statement.

questions.script: Will you order the pasta or the chicken? (A) I'll have the pasta.
Who should I talk to about getting a ticket to Bangkok? (B) The agent at the ticket counter.
Would you like the report to be e-mailed or printed out? (C) Either way is fine.
Have you decided how much to charge... (A) Yes—fifteen dollars each.
How often does the store offer a sales promotion? (C) Every three months.
The tour starts at noon today, doesn't it? (C) No—it's been postponed an hour.
Let's begin our meeting about the Taylor project. (A) Good idea—we have a lot to get through.
There's a dental clinic on Main Street, isn't there? (A) Yes, it's very convenient.
Where is the book reading going to take place? (B) At the library.
When's the bus going to be here? (C) At 3:30 P.M.
The estimated price for this car insurance is higher... (A) We'll check to see if there's a cheaper rate.
Why haven't the renovations been completed yet? (B) Because some materials were delayed.
I'll give you my office number... (C) Thanks—I appreciate that.
Which parking area should we use? (C) The one by Smith's Pharmacy.
Let's take a taxi to the airport. (B) Sure, that will be the easiest.
Our team training session was well attended, wasn't it? (C) Actually, not everyone was there.
Why's the company discontinuing its newsletter? (A) Only the print version.
Weren't you planning to take the afternoon off? (A) The clients wanted to meet today.
Dr. Molina sees patients in her Middleville office. (B) Oh, that's only two kilometers from my house.
Who's going out for lunch? (B) I'll be leaving work before then.
Do the tickets go on sale this week or next? (B) They're already sold out.
When will you finish updating the sales data? (A) I'm waiting for information from one more store.
Who's leading the planning session tomorrow? (B) I'll be out of the office.
Aren't we meeting with the clients this evening? (C) My flight to Japan leaves at six.
They invited me to the opening, didn't they? (C) Check your inbox.

listeningParts.title: Part 3: Conversations
listeningParts.instruction: Select the best response to each question based on the conversation.

subQuestions.content: What kind of work does the man do?
options: A. He is a tour guide.

subQuestions.content: What has caused problems for the speakers' business?
What will the woman update on a mobile application?
What industry do the speakers most likely work in?
What does the man suggest?
options: A. Providing online access to videos

subQuestions.content: Why do the speakers need to wait?
options: A. Promotional items have not been ordered.
B. A facility is not available.
C. A budget is too small.
D. A program has not been approved.

subQuestions.content: Who is the woman?
What does the woman say about online shopping?
options: A. It is cheaper than buying in person.
B. It makes shopping a social experience.
C. It is reducing traffic problems in the city.
D. It is affecting specialty shops.

subQuestions.content: What does the woman suggest doing?
Why have a company's sales increased?
options: A. A rebate program was started.
B. A competitor went out of business.
C. A celebrity endorsed the company.
D. A product won an award.

subQuestions.content: What industry do the speakers most likely work in?
What does the man say he is planning to do?
What upcoming event are the speakers discussing?
What product has the speakers' company recently developed?
Why does the woman recommend Kavi?
options: A. He is a good communicator.
C. He leads a product development team.
D. He lives near the event venue.

subQuestions.content: Where do the speakers most likely work?
options: D. At a real estate agency

subQuestions.content: What does the man tell the woman about?
Why will the man most likely contact Kelly Graham?
options: A. To plan an office celebration
B. To arrange a training session

subQuestions.content: What industry do the men work in?
How did the men learn about the woman?
What does the woman want to do next week?
What type of business do the speakers work for?
Why does the man say, 'that can take a lot of time'?
What does the woman suggest?
What industry do the men most likely work in?
Why did the men request a meeting?
options: C. To discuss a product design
D. To suggest a marketing strategy

subQuestions.content: What will the speakers most likely do next?
What type of business does the woman work in?
Why does the woman say, 'our current carpeting is a light color'?
options: A. To suggest an expense was not justified
B. To express surprise about a decision
C. To describe a problem with an order
D. To indicate the need to make a change

subQuestions.content: What does the man's business offer?
What did the man's client request?
Look at the graphic. How much does the man's coffee cost?
What does the woman say about David?
options: B. He is organizing a party.

subQuestions.content: What does the man most likely do?
What does the woman provide?
Look at the graphic. Which appointment will the man try to reschedule?
What industry do the speakers most likely work in?
Why does the woman want the man to attend a conference?
options: A. To learn more about the latest industry trends
B. To accept a reward on behalf of the company
C. To host a panel discussion

subQuestions.content: Look at the graphic. Which tip does the woman point out?

listeningParts.title: Part 4: Talks
listeningParts.instruction: Select the best response to each question based on the talk.

subQuestions.content: Where do the listeners most likely work?
options: B. At a car repair shop

subQuestions.content: What problem does the speaker mention?
options: A. A training manual should be updated.

subQuestions.content: What should the listeners remind customers about?
What does the company sell?
What does the speaker say will happen in December?
options: A. A promotional sale will begin.
B. Special equipment will be delivered.
C. Some temporary staff will be hired.
D. Some profits will be donated to a charity.

subQuestions.content: According to the speaker, what can the listeners find on a social media site?
What is the episode mainly about?
What does the speaker mean when he says, 'these things are constantly changing'?
options: A. He recommends professional development courses.
B. He questions the value of an investment.
C. Some information will be excluded.

subQuestions.content: What does the speaker say is important for organizations to do?
options: A. Be leaders in their industries
D. Use familiar and current strategies

subQuestions.content: What does the speaker say the company sells?
What will the listeners discuss with their supervisors?
How will the company offer more flexibility?
options: B. By allowing employees to switch assignments

subQuestions.content: What is the purpose of the meeting?
What did the speaker ask the listeners to bring to the meeting?
Why might some of the listeners look for Sumit?
options: C. To volunteer for an event
D. To check the status of a request

subQuestions.content: What did the speaker recently receive?
What does the speaker mean when he says, 'We have a lot of work to do'?
options: A. Extra shifts will be scheduled.
B. A job opening will be posted soon.

subQuestions.content: What will the speaker do next?
Where does the speaker work?
What will happen in March?
options: A. A new facility will open.
B. An exhibition will be held.
D. Operating hours will be extended.

subQuestions.content: What does the speaker say can be found online?
options: B. A calendar of upcoming events

subQuestions.content: Who are today's guests on the podcast?
Why does the speaker say, 'The Salazar family has kept the operation small'?
options: A. To indicate why a product is only sold online
B. To justify the high price of a product
C. To suggest that a company is having financial difficulties
D. To explain why a product is not well-known

subQuestions.content: What will the listeners be able to do after the podcast?
options: D. Sign up for a class

subQuestions.content: According to the speaker, why was a transit route changed?
options: A. Some streets are being resurfaced.
B. Some roads are closed for a bicycle race.
C. A group of residents is hosting a fund-raising concert.
D. A local politician will be speaking in a park.

subQuestions.content: Look at the graphic. Where will the listeners find a new bus stop?
Why should the listeners check a mobile phone application?
options: A. To apply for a job
B. To scan a promotional code
C. To view bus schedule updates

subQuestions.content: Where does the speaker work?
Look at the graphic. Which workshop will be offered on Fridays starting in March?
What will Bianca do next week?

readingParts.title: Part 5: Incomplete Sentences
readingParts.instruction: Select the best answer to complete the sentence.

questions.content: All employees must _______ their identification badges...

readingParts.title: Part 6: Text Completion
readingParts.instruction: Select the best answer to complete the text.

readingParts.title: Part 7: Reading Comprehension
readingParts.instruction: Select the best answer for each question.
